tEn: SparDA: Sparse Decoupled Attention for Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
tZh: SparDA: 用于高效长上下文 LLM 推理的稀疏解耦注意力
sEn: SparDA introduces a decoupled sparse attention architecture with a Forecast projection to overlap KV cache prefetching with computation, achieving up to 1.7× decode speedup and 5.3× higher throughput.
sZh: SparDA 提出了一种解耦的稀疏注意力架构，通过引入预测投影（Forecast）将 KV 缓存预取与计算重叠，实现了高达 1.7 倍的解码加速和 5.3 倍的吞吐量提升。
absEn: Sparse attention reduces compute and memory bandwidth for long-context LLM inference. However, two key challenges remain: (1) KV cache capacity still grows with sequence length, and offloading to CPU memory introduces a PCIe transfer bottleneck; (2) the sparse selection step itself retains $O(T^2)$ complexity and can dominate attention cost at long contexts. We propose SparDA, a decoupled sparse attention architecture that introduces a fourth per-layer projection, the Forecast, alongside Query, Key, and Value. The Forecast predicts the KV blocks needed by the next layer, enabling lookahead selection that overlaps CPU-to-GPU prefetch with current-layer execution. Because Forecast is decoupled from the attention query, our GQA implementation uses one Forecast head per GQA group, reducing selection overhead versus the original multi-head selector. SparDA adds $<$0.5% parameters and trains only the Forecast projections by matching the original selector's attention distribution. On two sparse-pretrained 8B models, SparDA matches or slightly improves accuracy and delivers up to 1.25$\times$ prefill speedup and 1.7$\times$ decode speedup over the sparse-attention offload baseline. By enabling larger feasible batch sizes on a single GPU, SparDA further reaches up to 5.3$\times$ higher decode throughput than the non-offload sparse baseline. Our source code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/SparDA.
absZh: 稀疏注意力减少了长上下文 LLM 推理的计算和内存带宽，但仍面临两个关键挑战：（1）KV 缓存容量随序列长度增长，卸载到 CPU 内存会引入 PCIe 传输瓶颈；（2）稀疏选择步骤本身保持 O(T²)复杂度，在长上下文中可能主导注意力成本。我们提出 SparDA，一种解耦的稀疏注意力架构，在查询、键和值之外引入了第四个逐层投影——预测（Forecast）。预测预测下一层所需的 KV 块，实现超前选择，将 CPU 到 GPU 的预取与当前层执行重叠。由于预测与注意力查询解耦，我们的 GQA 实现每个 GQA 组使用一个预测头，相比原始多头选择器减少了选择开销。SparDA 仅增加<0.5%的参数，并通过匹配原始选择器的注意力分布仅训练预测投影。在两个稀疏预训练的 8B 模型上，SparDA 匹配或略微提升准确率，相比稀疏注意力卸载基线，实现了高达 1.25 倍的预填充加速和 1.7 倍的解码加速。通过在单个 GPU 上实现更大的可行批处理大小，SparDA 进一步达到比非卸载稀疏基线高 5.3 倍的解码吞吐量。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/SparDA 获取。

contrib.en: Introduces Forecast, a fourth per-layer projection that predicts KV blocks for the next layer, enabling lookahead prefetch.
contrib.zh: 引入 Forecast，即每层第四个投影，预测下一层所需的 KV 块，实现前瞻预取。

contrib.en: Decouples sparse selection from attention query, using one Forecast head per GQA group to reduce selection overhead.
contrib.zh: 将稀疏选择与注意力查询解耦，每个 GQA 组使用一个 Forecast 头，降低选择开销。

contrib.en: Implements asynchronous CPU-to-GPU prefetch with a persistent UVA kernel, overlapping transfer with layer execution.
contrib.zh: 通过持久化 UVA 内核实现异步 CPU 到 GPU 预取，使传输与层执行重叠。

contrib.en: Adds <0.5% parameters and trains only Forecast projections via KL divergence, preserving base model accuracy.
contrib.zh: 增加 <0.5% 参数，仅通过 KL 散度训练 Forecast 投影，保持基础模型精度。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 1.25x prefill and 1.7x decode speedup over sparse-attention offload baseline on 8B models.
contrib.zh: 在 8B 模型上，相比稀疏注意力卸载基线，实现高达 1.25 倍预填充和 1.7 倍解码加速。

contrib.en: Enables larger batch sizes on a single GPU, reaching up to 5.3x higher decode throughput than non-offload sparse baseline.
contrib.zh: 在单 GPU 上支持更大批大小，解码吞吐量比非卸载稀疏基线高 5.3 倍。

limits.en: Accuracy is bounded by the base sparse attention method; SparDA does not change the sparse pattern.
limits.zh: 精度受限于基础稀疏注意力方法；SparDA 不改变稀疏模式。

limits.en: Evaluated only on 8B models with block-sparse attention; extension to token-level sparsity is future work.
limits.zh: 仅在 8B 模型和块稀疏注意力上评估；扩展到词元级稀疏性是未来工作。

limits.en: Requires sparse-pretrained models; not applicable to dense models without retraining.
limits.zh: 需要稀疏预训练模型；不适用于未重新训练的稠密模型。

limits.en: Layer-0 KV cache remains on GPU, causing slightly earlier out-of-memory at very long contexts.
limits.zh: 第 0 层 KV 缓存保留在 GPU 上，在极长上下文时略早出现内存不足。

limits.en: Prefetch CTA count heuristic may not be optimal across all hardware and batch sizes.
limits.zh: 预取 CTA 数量启发式方法可能并非在所有硬件和批大小下最优。

items.en: Abstract: Sparse attention reduces compute and memory bandwidth for long-context LLM inference. However, two key challenges remain: (1) KV cache capacity still grows with sequence length, and offloading to CPU memory introduces a PCIe transfer bottleneck; (2) the sparse selection step itself retains O⁡(T2)O(T^{2}) complexity and can dominate attention cost at long contexts. We propose SparDA, a decoupled sparse attention architecture that introduces a fourth per-layer projection, the Forecast, alongside Query, Key, and Value. The Forecast predicts the KV blocks needed by the next layer, enabling lookahead selection that overlaps CPU-to-GPU prefetch with current-layer execution. Because Forecast is decoupled from the attention query, our GQA implementation uses one Forecast head per GQA group, reducing selection overhead versus the original multi-head selector. SparDA adds <<0.5% parameters and trains only the Forecast projections by matching the original selector’s attention distribution. On two sparse-pretrained 8B models, SparDA matches or slightly improves accuracy and delivers up to 1.25×\times prefill speedup and 1.7×\times decode speedup over the sparse-attention offload baseline. By enabling larger feasible batch sizes on a single GPU, SparDA further reaches up to 5.3×\times higher decode throughput than the non-offload sparse baseline. Our source code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/SparDA.
items.zh: 摘要：稀疏注意力减少了长上下文 LLM 推理的算力和内存带宽。然而，仍存在两个关键挑战：（1）KV 缓存容量随序列长度增长，卸载到 CPU 内存会引入 PCIe 传输瓶颈；（2）稀疏选择步骤本身保持 O(T²)复杂度，在长上下文中可能主导注意力成本。我们提出 SparDA，一种解耦的稀疏注意力架构，在 Query、Key 和 Value 之外引入第四层投影——Forecast。Forecast 预测下一层所需的 KV 块，实现超前选择，使 CPU 到 GPU 的预取与当前层执行重叠。由于 Forecast 与注意力查询解耦，我们的 GQA 实现为每个 GQA 组使用一个 Forecast 头，相比原始多头选择器减少了选择开销。SparDA 仅增加<0.5%的参数，并通过匹配原始选择器的注意力分布仅训练 Forecast 投影。在两个稀疏预训练的 8B 模型上，SparDA 匹配或略微提升准确率，相比稀疏注意力卸载基线，预填充加速高达 1.25 倍，解码加速高达 1.7 倍。通过支持单 GPU 上更大的可行批大小，SparDA 进一步实现了比非卸载稀疏基线高达 5.3 倍的解码吞吐量。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/SparDA 获取。

items.en: Modern LLM applications increasingly require long context windows, especially for agentic and long-reasoning use cases [35, 24]. This imposes three major efficiency challenges on the underlying serving infrastructure: 1) high compute demand for attention in the prefill phase; 2) high memory bandwidth pressure for attention in the decode phase; and 3) high KV cache capacity pressure in the decode phase. Sparse attention [31, 33, 19] is a promising technique that has been adopted by recent frontier models [6, 11, 7] to improve long-context LLM inference efficiency. However, most sparse attention methods primarily reduce attention compute and memory bandwidth; while some also shrink the KV cache, capacity pressure persists as context lengths continue to grow.
items.zh: 现代 LLM 应用越来越需要长上下文窗口，特别是对于智能体式和长推理用例[35, 24]。这给底层服务基础设施带来了三个主要效率挑战：1）预填充阶段注意力计算的高算力需求；2）解码阶段注意力计算的高内存带宽压力；3）解码阶段 KV 缓存容量的高压力。稀疏注意力[31, 33, 19]是一种有前景的技术，已被最近的前沿模型[6, 11, 7]采用，以提高长上下文 LLM 推理效率。然而，大多数稀疏注意力方法主要减少注意力计算和内存带宽；虽然有些也缩小了 KV 缓存，但随着上下文长度持续增长，容量压力仍然存在。

items.en: A straightforward solution to this problem is to offload the KV cache to CPU memory and only fetch selected KV blocks to GPU memory for sparse attention dynamically during the decode phase. However, CPU fetching through the PCIe interface is still much slower than fetching from GPU memory, which becomes a bottleneck for long-context decoding. Prior work [34, 13] proposes both system- and algorithm-level optimizations to reduce CPU fetching traffic. InfiniGen [16] further shows that lookahead prefetching can hide part of this latency, but it relies on the raw hidden state as a proxy for future attention and can be inaccurate when adjacent-layer similarity breaks down.
items.zh: 解决此问题的一个直接方法是将 KV 缓存卸载到 CPU 内存，并在解码阶段动态地将选中的 KV 块取到 GPU 内存进行稀疏注意力。然而，通过 PCIe 接口的 CPU 取回仍然比从 GPU 内存取回慢得多，这成为长上下文解码的瓶颈。先前的工作[34, 13]提出了系统和算法层面的优化以减少 CPU 取回流量。InfiniGen[16]进一步表明，超前预取可以隐藏部分延迟，但它依赖原始隐藏状态作为未来注意力的代理，当相邻层相似性被破坏时可能不准确。

items.en: Meanwhile, sparse attention itself introduces additional overhead from sparse selection. While the complexity of sparse attention has dropped from O⁡(T2)O(T^{2}) to O⁡(T)O(T), where TT is the sequence length, sparse selection remains O⁡(T2)O(T^{2}) and can easily dominate the attention module as context grows. Recent work such as IndexCache [1] and HISA [29] reduces selection overhead, but typically introduces an accuracy–efficiency trade-off that does not fully preserve the original accuracy.
items.zh: 同时，稀疏注意力本身从稀疏选择引入了额外开销。虽然稀疏注意力的复杂度已从 O(T²)降至 O(T)，其中 T 是序列长度，但稀疏选择仍保持 O(T²)，随着上下文增长很容易主导注意力模块。最近的工作如 IndexCache[1]和 HISA[29]减少了选择开销，但通常引入了准确率-效率权衡，不能完全保持原始准确率。

items.en: To address the above issues, we propose SparDA, a decoupled sparse attention architecture that introduces a fourth per-layer projection, the Forecast, alongside the standard Query, Key, and Value (Figure 1). Rather than treating the previous hidden state as a proxy, SparDA trains this Forecast to predict the sparse selector’s next-layer selection directly. SparDA has three key innovations:
items.zh: 为解决上述问题，我们提出 SparDA，一种解耦的稀疏注意力架构，在标准 Query、Key 和 Value 之外引入第四层投影——Forecast（图 1）。SparDA 不是将先前的隐藏状态作为代理，而是训练这个 Forecast 直接预测稀疏选择器的下一层选择。SparDA 有三个关键创新：

items.en: Trainable lookahead sparse selection. In standard sparse attention, the attention query drives both top-kk selection and sparse attention within the same layer. SparDA decouples these roles: the Forecast generated in layer ll drives top-kk selection for layer l+1l{+}1, while the attention query still performs sparse attention, enabling CPU-to-GPU KV cache prefetching to overlap with the current layer’s execution.
items.zh: 可训练的超前稀疏选择。在标准稀疏注意力中，注意力查询在同一层内驱动 top-k 选择和稀疏注意力。SparDA 解耦了这些角色：第 l 层生成的 Forecast 驱动第 l+1 层的 top-k 选择，而注意力查询仍执行稀疏注意力，使 CPU 到 GPU 的 KV 缓存预取与当前层执行重叠。

items.en: Compact Forecast indexer. Once Forecast is decoupled from the attention query, it no longer needs to preserve the full query-head structure for sparse selection. In our GQA implementation, the Forecast indexer uses a single Forecast head per GQA group, substantially reducing sparse-selection overhead and entirely skipping the softmax operation.
items.zh: 紧凑的 Forecast 索引器。一旦 Forecast 与注意力查询解耦，它不再需要为稀疏选择保留完整的查询头结构。在我们的 GQA 实现中，Forecast 索引器为每个 GQA 组使用一个 Forecast 头，大幅减少稀疏选择开销，并完全跳过 softmax 操作。

items.en: Asynchronous prefetch with persistent UVA kernel. We implement the asynchronous prefetch pipeline with a persistent Unified Virtual Addressing (UVA) Triton kernel that performs high-throughput host-to-device transfers in parallel with the main GPU kernels, making sparse-attention offloading practical for large-batch long-context decoding.
items.zh: 使用持久 UVA 内核的异步预取。我们使用持久统一虚拟寻址（UVA）Triton 内核实现异步预取流水线，该内核与主 GPU 内核并行执行高吞吐量的主机到设备传输，使稀疏注意力卸载对于大批量长上下文解码变得实用。

items.en: SparDA can be integrated into sparse-pretrained models by training only the lightweight Forecast projections (<<0.5% additional parameters) via Kullback–Leibler (KL) divergence against the original selector’s block-attention distribution, without retraining the base model. We evaluate SparDA on MiniCPM4.1-8B [20] and NOSA-8B [13], two sparse-pretrained 8B models, and show that it maintains comparable or slightly better accuracy than the sparse baseline on long-context and long-reasoning benchmarks. In efficiency, SparDA achieves up to 1.25×\times prefill speedup and 1.7×\times decode speedup over the sparse-attention offload baseline; by enabling larger feasible batch sizes on a single GPU, it further reaches up to 5.3×\times higher decode throughput than the non-offload sparse baseline.
items.zh: SparDA 可以通过仅训练轻量级 Forecast 投影（<0.5%额外参数）集成到稀疏预训练模型中，通过 KL 散度匹配原始选择器的块注意力分布，无需重新训练基础模型。我们在 MiniCPM4.1-8B[20]和 NOSA-8B[13]两个稀疏预训练的 8B 模型上评估 SparDA，结果显示在长上下文和长推理基准上，其准确率与稀疏基线相当或略有提升。在效率方面，SparDA 相比稀疏注意力卸载基线，预填充加速高达 1.25 倍，解码加速高达 1.7 倍；通过支持单 GPU 上更大的可行批大小，进一步实现了比非卸载稀疏基线高达 5.3 倍的解码吞吐量。

items.en: KV cache compression permanently discards or merges tokens to reduce the cache footprint [32, 17, 25], which can cause accuracy loss when discarded context is later needed. Training-free sparse attention instead selects a subset of tokens or blocks per query without removing the rest from the KV cache [23, 21, 3]. MInference [14], FlexPrefill [15], and XAttention [28] further exploit dynamic sparse patterns to accelerate the prefill phase. Preserving the full cache generally incurs less accuracy loss than permanent eviction, but the growing cache footprint remains a challenge.
items.zh: KV 缓存压缩永久丢弃或合并词元以减少缓存占用[32, 17, 25]，当丢弃的上下文后来需要时可能导致准确率损失。免训练稀疏注意力则从 KV 缓存中为每个查询选择一部分词元或块，而不移除其余部分[23, 21, 3]。MInference[14]、FlexPrefill[15]和 XAttention[28]进一步利用动态稀疏模式加速预填充阶段。保留完整缓存通常比永久驱逐导致更少的准确率损失，但不断增长的缓存占用仍然是一个挑战。

items.en: Trainable sparse attention learns the selection structure during pretraining. InfLLM-V2 [33], MoBA [19], and SeerAttention [10] use parameter-free or self-distilled block selection over mean-pooled keys; Native Sparse Attention (NSA) [31] fuses compressed, sparse, and sliding-window branches via learnable gating. DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) [6] moves to token-level sparsity, and DeepSeek-V4 [7] further interleaves Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) with Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA), cutting per-token KV cache ∼10×\sim 10\times over DeepSeek-V3.2; yet its 8×8\times longer context still leaves absolute capacity a bottleneck. For reducing sparse selection overhead, IndexCache [1] reuses top-kk indices across adjacent layers, and HISA [29] replaces the flat scan with hierarchical filtering. SparDA extends DSA’s lightning indexer to block-sparse attention, operating one layer ahead and pruning to one Forecast head per GQA group.
items.zh: 可训练稀疏注意力在预训练期间学习选择结构。InfLLM-V2[33]、MoBA[19]和 SeerAttention[10]使用无参数或自蒸馏的块选择，基于均值池化的键；原生稀疏注意力（NSA）[31]通过可学习门控融合压缩、稀疏和滑动窗口分支。DeepSeek 稀疏注意力（DSA）[6]转向词元级稀疏性，DeepSeek-V4[7]进一步交错压缩稀疏注意力（CSA）和重度压缩注意力（HCA），将每个词元的 KV 缓存减少约 10 倍于 DeepSeek-V3.2；但其 8 倍更长的上下文仍使绝对容量成为瓶颈。为减少稀疏选择开销，IndexCache[1]跨相邻层重用 top-k 索引，HISA[29]用层次过滤替换平面扫描。SparDA 将 DSA 的闪电索引器扩展到块稀疏注意力，提前一层操作，并为每个 GQA 组修剪为一个 Forecast 头。

items.en: Several methods [4, 22, 5] offload the KV cache to CPU and manage GPU-resident entries through eviction, recall, or low-rank proxies. NOSA [13] pairs a query-agnostic eviction head with a query-aware selector and issues UVA-based CPU-to-GPU transfers synchronously per layer, reducing volume rather than hiding latency. SparseServe [34] and HiSparse [27] are sparse-attention serving systems that offload KV cache to host memory and reactively swap entries on demand — SparseServe via working-set-aware batch sizing and fragmentation-aware transfers, HiSparse via LRU eviction and a custom swap kernel; neither targets within-layer transfer-compute overlap. InfiniGen [16] is closest to SparDA: it prefetches a subset of CPU-resident KV to GPU before each layer using the raw hidden state as a cross-layer proxy, overlapping DMA-based memory copies with the preceding layer. SparDA instead learns a cross-layer Forecast projection—bridging DSA’s trained decoupled indexer with InfiniGen’s lookahead—and co-designs it with a persistent UVA prefetch kernel for communication-computation overlap.
items.zh: 几种方法[4, 22, 5]将 KV 缓存卸载到 CPU，并通过驱逐、召回或低秩代理管理 GPU 驻留条目。NOSA[13]将查询无关的驱逐头与查询感知选择器配对，并逐层同步发出基于 UVA 的 CPU 到 GPU 传输，减少传输量而非隐藏延迟。SparseServe[34]和 HiSparse[27]是稀疏注意力服务系统，将 KV 缓存卸载到主机内存，并按需反应式交换条目——SparseServe 通过工作集感知的批大小调整和碎片感知传输，HiSparse 通过 LRU 驱逐和自定义交换内核；两者都不针对层内传输-计算重叠。InfiniGen[16]与 SparDA 最接近：它在每层之前使用原始隐藏状态作为跨层代理预取 CPU 驻留 KV 的子集到 GPU，使基于 DMA 的内存复制与前一层的执行重叠。SparDA 则学习一个跨层 Forecast 投影——桥接 DSA 的训练解耦索引器与 InfiniGen 的超前预测——并与持久 UVA 预取内核协同设计，实现通信-计算重叠。

items.en: In this paper, we build SparDA on top of InfLLM-V2 [33]. InfLLM-V2 is architecturally representative of block-sparse attention: it decomposes attention into initial tokens, a local sliding window, and top-kk selected blocks, the same components shared by NSA [31], MoBA [19], QUEST [23], and StreamingLLM [26]. Since SparDA modifies only the top-kk selection path, we expect the same design to apply to other methods with this initial/local/top-kk structure. This section recaps the components that SparDA directly extends.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们在 InfLLM-V2[33]之上构建 SparDA。InfLLM-V2 在架构上代表了块稀疏注意力：它将注意力分解为初始词元、局部滑动窗口和 top-k 选中块，这些组件与 NSA[31]、MoBA[19]、QUEST[23]和 StreamingLLM[26]共享。由于 SparDA 仅修改 top-k 选择路径，我们期望相同的设计适用于其他具有这种初始/局部/top-k 结构的方法。本节回顾 SparDA 直接扩展的组件。

items.en: InfLLM-V2 merges selected attention and sliding-window attention into a single sparse attention module with shared KV projections 𝐖K\mathbf{W}_{K} and 𝐖V\mathbf{W}_{V} inherited from the pretrained dense model. At layer ll, the attended block set for a query token at position ii is:
items.zh: InfLLM-V2 将选中的注意力和滑动窗口注意力合并为一个单一的稀疏注意力模块，共享从预训练密集模型继承的 KV 投影 W_K 和 W_V。在第 l 层，位置 i 的查询词元所关注的块集为：

items.en: where ℬinit\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{init}} covers a fixed set of initial blocks, ℬlocal​(i)\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{local}}(i) covers the local blocks, and ℬtopk​(i)\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{topk}}(i) contains the top-kk blocks selected by compression scores. Full attention is computed only over the KV entries in ℬl​(i)\mathcal{B}_{l}(i), reducing the per-query attention cost from O⁡(T)O(T) to O​(|ℬl​(i)|⋅B)O(|\mathcal{B}_{l}(i)|\cdot B), where TT is the sequence length and BB is the block size.
items.zh: 其中 B_init 覆盖固定的一组初始块，B_local(i)覆盖局部块，B_topk(i)包含由压缩分数选出的 top-k 块。仅对 B_l(i)中的 KV 条目计算完整注意力，将每个查询的注意力成本从 O(T)降低到 O(|B_l(i)|·B)，其中 T 是序列长度，B 是块大小。

items.en: InfLLM-V2 uses a parameter-free, coarse-to-fine compression pipeline to compute block-level relevance scores for ℬtopk\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{topk}}. In the first stage, keys 𝐊l\mathbf{K}_{l} are mean-pooled into overlapping compressed representations 𝐊~l\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l} with kernel size lC1l_{C_{1}} and stride sC1s_{C_{1}}:
items.zh: InfLLM-V2 使用无参数的粗到细压缩流水线计算 B_topk 的块级相关性分数。在第一阶段，键 K_l 通过均值池化为重叠的压缩表示 K̃_l，核大小为 l_C1，步长为 s_C1：

items.en: Each GQA group mm contains GG query heads that share one KV head. For head hh in group mm, scoring against the corresponding compressed keys yields per-compressed-key relevance 𝐒l,mh\mathbf{S}_{l,m}^{h}. Scores are then summed within each group to produce a shared importance score 𝐒l,mshared\mathbf{S}_{l,m}^{\mathrm{shared}}. In the final stage, a max-pooling operation over each 𝐒l,mshared\mathbf{S}_{l,m}^{\mathrm{shared}} produces the block-level score used for top-kk selection. This three-stage process computes block scores from several overlapping sub-blocks rather than a single coarse pooling, preserving finer-grained information.
items.zh: 每个 GQA 组 m 包含 G 个查询头，共享一个 KV 头。对于组 m 中的头 h，与压缩键的评分产生每个压缩键的相关性 S_{l,m}^h。然后每个组内的分数求和，产生共享的重要性分数 S_{l,m}^{shared。在最后阶段，对每个 S_{l,m}^{shared}进行最大池化操作，产生用于 top-k 选择的块级分数。这个三阶段过程从几个重叠的子块而不是单个粗池化计算块分数，保留了更细粒度的信息。

items.en: As discussed in Section 1, the primary goals of SparDA are twofold: (1) to enable KV cache prefetching that overlaps with layer execution for latency hiding; and (2) to reduce the overhead of sparse selection. SparDA achieves both through a single architectural change: a fourth per-layer projection, the Forecast 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l}, produced alongside the standard 𝐐l,𝐊l,𝐕l\mathbf{Q}_{l},\mathbf{K}_{l},\mathbf{V}_{l}, that drives a compact sparse-selection indexer. 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} decouples sparse selection from the attention query so it can be computed one layer ahead. This decoupling also means the indexer no longer needs the full query-head structure used for attention; in our GQA implementation, 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} replaces the original per-query-head scoring loop with one Forecast head per GQA group and skips the softmax normalization. Figure 2 illustrates the resulting layer structure compared with the InfLLM-V2 baseline.
items.zh: 如第 1 节所述，SparDA 的主要目标有两个：（1）实现 KV 缓存预取与层执行重叠以隐藏延迟；（2）减少稀疏选择的开销。SparDA 通过一个单一的架构更改实现这两点：第四层投影——Forecast F_l，与标准 Q_l、K_l、V_l 一起生成，驱动一个紧凑的稀疏选择索引器。F_l 将稀疏选择与注意力查询解耦，因此可以提前一层计算。这种解耦也意味着索引器不再需要用于注意力的完整查询头结构；在我们的 GQA 实现中，F_l 用每个 GQA 组一个 Forecast 头替换了原始的每查询头评分循环，并跳过了 softmax 归一化。图 2 展示了与 InfLLM-V2 基线相比的最终层结构。

items.en: In the original InfLLM-V2 sparse attention (Figure 2a), the query 𝐐l\mathbf{Q}_{l} is used both for top-kk sparse selection and for the sparse attention computation, and both steps happen within the same layer. SparDA decouples these two roles. The linear projection ϕl\phi_{l} in each layer produces an additional Forecast 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} besides the standard 𝐐l\mathbf{Q}_{l}, 𝐊l\mathbf{K}_{l}, 𝐕l\mathbf{V}_{l}:
items.zh: 在原始的 InfLLM-V2 稀疏注意力中（图 2a），查询 Q_l 既用于 top-k 稀疏选择，也用于稀疏注意力计算，且两个步骤发生在同一层内。SparDA 解耦了这两个角色。每层中的线性投影φ_l 除了标准 Q_l、K_l、V_l 之外，还产生一个额外的 Forecast F_l：

items.en: For brevity, the equations in this subsection drop the per-query-token index used in Section 3. 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} is used for top-kk sparse selection while 𝐐l\mathbf{Q}_{l} is used only for the sparse attention computation. Let ftop(⋅,k)f_{\mathrm{top}}(\cdot,k) denote the InfLLM-V2 block-selection operator, which max-pools compressed-key-grid scores to block-level scores and returns the top-kk blocks. Specifically, 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} scores against the compressed keys 𝐊~l+1\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l+1} of layer l+1l{+}1, and the resulting top-kk blocks are merged with the initial and local blocks to form the attended set for layer l+1l{+}1:
items.zh: 为简洁起见，本小节的方程省略了第 3 节中使用的每查询词元索引。F_l 用于 top-k 稀疏选择，而 Q_l 仅用于稀疏注意力计算。令 f_top(·,k)表示 InfLLM-V2 块选择算子，它将压缩键网格上的分数最大池化为块级分数，并返回 top-k 块。具体地，F_l 对第 l+1 层的压缩键 K̃_{l+1}进行评分，得到的 top-k 块与初始块和局部块合并，形成第 l+1 层的关注集：

items.en: The sparse attention at layer l+1l{+}1 still uses the original query 𝐐l+1\mathbf{Q}_{l+1}:
items.zh: 第 l+1 层的稀疏注意力仍然使用原始查询 Q_{l+1}：

items.en: For the first layer (l=0l{=}0), where no previous Forecast exists, SparDA produces a current-layer Forecast 𝐅0cur\mathbf{F}_{0}^{\mathrm{cur}} from 𝐗0\mathbf{X}_{0} via a separate projection and uses it for same-layer selection. 𝐅0cur\mathbf{F}_{0}^{\mathrm{cur}} still uses one Forecast head per GQA group rather than the original attention query, so the selection cost remains lower than the baseline’s even without the one-layer-ahead benefit. For the final layer, 𝐅L−1\mathbf{F}_{L-1} is unused since there is no subsequent layer to predict for.
items.zh: 对于第一层（l=0），由于不存在之前的预测，SparDA 通过单独的投影从 X_0 生成当前层的预测 F_0^{cur}，并将其用于同层选择。F_0^{cur} 每个 GQA 组仍使用一个预测头而非原始注意力查询，因此即使没有提前一层的优势，选择成本仍低于基线。对于最后一层，F_{L-1} 未被使用，因为没有后续层需要预测。

items.en: The benefit of decoupled selection differs across inference phases. During prefill (Figure 2b), all keys are already on GPU, so the only saving is the reduced sparse selection cost. During decode (Figure 2c), the KV cache is offloaded to CPU memory and the one-layer-ahead prediction becomes critical: 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} produces ℬl+1\mathcal{B}_{l+1} while layer ll is still executing, so the runtime can prefetch the selected KV entries from CPU and overlap the PCIe transfer with layer execution. The compressed keys 𝐊~l+1cache\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l+1}^{\mathrm{cache}} are kept on GPU and updated incrementally; because the sparse selection excludes the initial and local blocks, ℬl+1\mathcal{B}_{l+1} does not depend on the next layer’s newly appended keys. Algorithms 1 and 2 in Appendix A summarize the per-layer steps.
items.zh: 解耦选择在不同推理阶段带来的收益不同。在预填充阶段（图 2b），所有键已在 GPU 上，因此唯一节省的是稀疏选择成本的降低。在解码阶段（图 2c），KV 缓存被卸载到 CPU 内存，提前一层的预测变得关键：F_l 在第 l 层仍在执行时生成 B_{l+1}，因此运行时可以预取选中的 KV 条目从 CPU 传输，并使 PCIe 传输与层执行重叠。压缩后的键 K̃_{l+1}^{cache} 保留在 GPU 上并增量更新；由于稀疏选择排除了初始和局部块，B_{l+1} 不依赖于下一层新追加的键。附录 A 中的算法 1 和 2 总结了每层的步骤。

items.en: The key observation is that once Forecast is decoupled from the attention query, sparse selection no longer has to use the same head layout as attention. Block-sparse selectors such as InfLLM-V2 currently score each GQA group with all GG query heads, because the attention query itself drives selection. DSA’s lightning indexer [6] already exploits this decoupling at the token level with fewer heads than the attention query. SparDA brings the same design to block-sparse attention: 𝐅l\mathbf{F}_{l} has one Forecast head per GQA group (one per KV head) rather than one per query head, eliminating the per-query-head scoring loop and significantly reducing top-kk selection overhead. It also naturally skips the softmax operation that standard block-sparse selectors apply before top-kk ranking, since there is no need for score summation across multiple query heads within a GQA group.
items.zh: 关键观察是，一旦预测与注意力查询解耦，稀疏选择不再必须使用与注意力相同的头布局。诸如 InfLLM-V2 的块稀疏选择器目前使用所有 G 个查询头对每个 GQA 组评分，因为注意力查询本身驱动选择。DSA 的闪电索引器 [6] 已在 token 级别利用这种解耦，使用比注意力查询更少的头。SparDA 将相同设计引入块稀疏注意力：F_l 每个 GQA 组（每个 KV 头）有一个预测头，而非每个查询头一个，从而消除了每个查询头的评分循环，显著降低了 top-k 选择开销。它还自然地跳过了标准块稀疏选择器在 top-k 排序前应用的 softmax 操作，因为无需在 GQA 组内对多个查询头的分数求和。

items.en: SparDA can be added to existing sparse-pretrained models by training only the Forecast projections, without retraining the base model. On both MiniCPM4.1-8B and NOSA-8B, these projections add only 33.5M parameters (0.41% of the 8B total), making SparDA a lightweight add-on with negligible model-size overhead.
items.zh: SparDA 可以通过仅训练预测投影添加到现有的稀疏预训练模型中，无需重新训练基础模型。在 MiniCPM4.1-8B 和 NOSA-8B 上，这些投影仅增加 33.5M 参数（占 8B 总量的 0.41%），使 SparDA 成为轻量级附加组件，模型大小开销可忽略。

items.en: Inspired by DeepSeek DSA [6], the Forecast indexer is trained to match target block-attention scores via Kullback–Leibler (KL) divergence after top-kk restriction and renormalization. Since the models we use are already trained with sparse attention, we only train the Forecast projections and skip the full-model sparse training stage used in DSA’s two-stage pipeline. For target layer ll and GQA group mm, we use the shared importance score before the final max-pooling stage as the target score because max-pooling discards fine-grained ranking information that the indexer needs to learn. For the layer-0 case, we define 𝐅−1,m=𝐅0,mcur\mathbf{F}_{-1,m}=\mathbf{F}_{0,m}^{\mathrm{cur}}, so the same notation covers the current-layer Forecast used when no previous layer exists. The target and predicted scores are:
items.zh: 受 DeepSeek DSA [6] 启发，预测索引器通过 top-k 限制和重新归一化后的 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 散度进行训练，以匹配目标块注意力分数。由于我们使用的模型已经过稀疏注意力训练，我们仅训练预测投影，跳过了 DSA 两阶段流程中的全模型稀疏训练阶段。对于目标层 l 和 GQA 组 m，我们使用最终最大池化阶段之前的共享重要性分数作为目标分数，因为最大池化丢弃了索引器需要学习的细粒度排序信息。对于第 0 层的情况，我们定义 F_{-1,m} = F_{0,m}^{cur}，因此相同的符号涵盖了当不存在前一层时使用的当前层预测。目标和预测分数为：

items.en: where the predicted branch uses the Forecast 𝐅l−1\mathbf{F}_{l-1} from the previous layer’s indexer (or 𝐅0,mcur\mathbf{F}_{0,m}^{\mathrm{cur}} for layer 0), which produces a single score per KV head directly without GQA summation. Here τ\tau is the standard attention temperature. Stacking over all HkvH_{\mathrm{kv}} groups gives tensors 𝐒ltgt,𝐒lpred∈ℝHkv×T×Nb\mathbf{S}_{l}^{\mathrm{tgt}},\mathbf{S}_{l}^{\mathrm{pred}}\in\mathbb{R}^{H_{\mathrm{kv}}\times T\times N_{b}}, where HkvH_{\mathrm{kv}} is the number of KV heads (i.e., the number of GQA groups), TT is the number of query tokens, and NbN_{b} is the number of compressed key positions. Following DSA, we compute the KL loss over a top-kk partitioned distribution. Let 𝒮l=TopK⁡(𝐒ltgt,k)\mathcal{S}_{l}=\mathrm{TopK}(\mathbf{S}_{l}^{\mathrm{tgt}},\,k) denote the target’s selected set for each KV head and query token after causal masking and init/local-block exclusion. The training loss is:
items.zh: 其中预测分支使用来自前一层索引器的预测 F_{l-1}（或第 0 层的 F_{0,m}^{cur}），它直接为每个 KV 头生成单个分数，无需 GQA 求和。这里 τ 是标准注意力温度。将所有 H_{kv} 组堆叠得到张量 S_l^{tgt}, S_l^{pred} ∈ ℝ^{H_{kv} × T × N_b}，其中 H_{kv} 是 KV 头数（即 GQA 组数），T 是查询 token 数，N_b 是压缩键位置数。遵循 DSA，我们在 top-k 分区分布上计算 KL 损失。令 S_l = TopK(S_l^{tgt}, k) 表示在因果掩码和初始/局部块排除后，每个 KV 头和查询 token 的目标选择集。训练损失为：

items.en: where 𝐒¯⋅,𝒮\bar{\mathbf{S}}_{\cdot,\,\mathcal{S}} is the (k+1)(k{+}1)-dimensional distribution that keeps the scores of the kk target-selected blocks individually and aggregates the remaining mass into a single rest bucket, renormalized to sum to one. This focuses the indexer on the relative ranking within 𝒮l\mathcal{S}_{l} while still constraining the total mass on non-selected blocks; out-of-set logits therefore receive a non-trivial gradient through the rest bucket.
items.zh: 其中 S̄_{·, S} 是 (k+1) 维分布，它单独保留 k 个目标选择块的分数，并将剩余质量聚合到单个剩余桶中，重新归一化使其和为 1。这使索引器专注于 S_l 内的相对排序，同时约束非选择块上的总质量；因此，集合外的 logits 通过剩余桶获得非平凡梯度。

items.en: The compressed keys 𝐊~ltgt\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l}^{\mathrm{tgt}} and 𝐊~lpred\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l}^{\mathrm{pred}} in the target and predicted scores above are both computed by mean-pooling the original keys 𝐊l\mathbf{K}_{l}, but they can use different kernel sizes and strides. 𝐊~lpred\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l}^{\mathrm{pred}} always uses the standard InfLLM-V2 compression window (lC1=32l_{C_{1}}{=}32, sC1=16s_{C_{1}}{=}16) to match the inference-time configuration. A natural choice is to use the same window for 𝐊~ltgt\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l}^{\mathrm{tgt}}, but we find that using a smaller kernel size and stride of (2,1)(2,1) for the target produces a better indexer. The intuition is that finer-grained compression provides a higher-resolution supervision signal: each compressed key represents a smaller group of tokens, so the target scores are more discriminative and the indexer learns sharper selection decisions. Because the finer 𝐊~ltgt\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l}^{\mathrm{tgt}} produces more compressed positions than 𝐊~lpred\widetilde{\mathbf{K}}_{l}^{\mathrm{pred}}, we max-pool the resulting target score tensor 𝐒ltgt\mathbf{S}_{l}^{\mathrm{tgt}} down to the standard (32,16)(32,16) grid of 𝐒lpred\mathbf{S}_{l}^{\mathrm{pred}} before computing the KL loss, so both distributions live on the same set of block positions used at inference. The ablation in Table 6 in Appendix D confirms that this training-time mismatch improves accuracy.
items.zh: 上述目标和预测分数中的压缩键 K̃_l^{tgt} 和 K̃_l^{pred} 均通过对原始键 K_l 进行均值池化计算，但它们可以使用不同的核大小和步长。K̃_l^{pred} 始终使用标准的 InfLLM-V2 压缩窗口（l_{C1}=32, s_{C1}=16）以匹配推理时的配置。一个自然的选择是对 K̃_l^{tgt} 使用相同的窗口，但我们发现使用较小的核大小和步长 (2,1) 用于目标能产生更好的索引器。直觉是，更细粒度的压缩提供了更高分辨率的监督信号：每个压缩键代表更小的 token 组，因此目标分数更具区分性，索引器学习到更锐利的选择决策。由于更细的 K̃_l^{tgt} 产生比 K̃_l^{pred} 更多的压缩位置，我们在计算 KL 损失之前将得到的目标分数张量 S_l^{tgt} 最大池化到与 S_l^{pred} 相同的标准 (32,16) 网格，这样两个分布都位于推理时使用的相同块位置集上。附录 D 中的表 6 的消融实验证实，这种训练时的不匹配提高了准确性。

items.en: At inference, SparDA’s one-layer-ahead Forecast produces ℬl+1\mathcal{B}_{l+1} while layer ll is still executing. SparDA exploits this early availability through an asynchronous prefetch pipeline that transfers only the selected KV blocks from CPU to GPU before they are needed.
items.zh: 在推理时，SparDA 的提前一层预测在第 l 层仍在执行时生成 B_{l+1}。SparDA 通过异步预取流水线利用这种早期可用性，在需要之前仅将选中的 KV 块从 CPU 传输到 GPU。

items.en: Once the sparse pattern for the next layer is predicted, the runtime fetches the selected KV blocks ℬl+1\mathcal{B}_{l+1} from pinned CPU memory on a dedicated CUDA stream so that the transfer overlaps with layer execution. Instead of relying on many small, irregular memory copies, SparDA uses a persistent Triton kernel based on Unified Virtual Addressing (UVA). The kernel keeps a small fixed set of GPU thread blocks, or Cooperative Thread Arrays (CTAs), active and lets them continuously process block-transfer tasks within a single launch, reducing launch overhead, avoiding frequent synchronization, and limiting interference with the main compute stream. As a result, CPU-to-GPU KV cache transfers can be largely overlapped with layer execution, making prefetching practical even with large-batch, high-throughput decoding.
items.zh: 一旦预测出下一层的稀疏模式，运行时在专用的 CUDA 流上从固定 CPU 内存获取选中的 KV 块 B_{l+1}，使传输与层执行重叠。SparDA 不依赖许多小而不规则的内存拷贝，而是使用基于统一虚拟寻址 (UVA) 的持久 Triton 内核。该内核保持一小部分固定的 GPU 线程块（或协作线程数组 CTA）活跃，并在单次启动中连续处理块传输任务，从而减少启动开销、避免频繁同步，并限制与主计算流的干扰。因此，CPU 到 GPU 的 KV 缓存传输可以很大程度上与层执行重叠，即使在大批量、高吞吐解码中也能使预取变得实用。

items.en: The number of CTAs in the persistent kernel controls the trade-off between prefetch throughput and layer execution speed. More CTAs accelerate transfers toward the PCIe bandwidth ceiling but consume Streaming Multiprocessors (SMs) that would otherwise run the attention and FFN kernels. At small batch sizes the GPU is underutilized and layer execution dominates the critical path; a modest CTA budget suffices because the total transfer volume is small. As batch size grows, layer execution time scales sub-linearly (better SM occupancy) while prefetch volume grows linearly. Beyond a crossover point the prefetch becomes the new bottleneck, and allocating additional CTAs is worthwhile despite the marginal slowdown in layer execution. SparDA therefore adopts a simple heuristic to choose the CTA count that maximizes overall throughput for the underlying hardware. The sweep and chosen configurations are reported in Table 7 (Appendix D).
items.zh: 持久内核中的 CTA 数量控制着预取吞吐量与层执行速度之间的权衡。更多 CTA 加速传输以达到 PCIe 带宽上限，但会消耗原本用于运行注意力和 FFN 内核的流多处理器 (SM)。在小批量时，GPU 利用率不足，层执行主导关键路径；适度的 CTA 预算就足够，因为总传输量较小。随着批量增长，层执行时间次线性增长（更好的 SM 占用率），而预取量线性增长。超过交叉点后，预取成为新瓶颈，尽管层执行略有减慢，分配额外 CTA 仍是值得的。因此，SparDA 采用简单的启发式方法选择最大化底层硬件整体吞吐量的 CTA 数量。扫描和所选配置在表 7（附录 D）中报告。

items.en: We evaluate SparDA on two 8B models: MiniCPM4.1-8B [20], whose sparse backbone is InfLLM-V2 [33], and NOSA-8B [13], which adds a query-agnostic eviction head on top of InfLLM-V2. Accuracy is measured on HELMET [30], LongBench [2], RULER [12], and a long-reasoning suite (MATH-500 [18], AIME 2024, AIME 2025). We compare four configurations: dense, sparse, InfiniGen [16], and SparDA. We do not directly compare against DSA-specific accelerators such as IndexCache [1] or HISA [29], which target token-level DSA rather than the block-sparse backbones used here. Efficiency is measured on NVIDIA H100 and A100 GPUs using the runtime described in Section 4.3; Dense† and Sparse† denote the no-offload configurations, while Sparse, InfiniGen, and SparDA use CPU offloading. The main text reports H100 results; Appendix D includes A100 results. Full evaluation details are in Appendix C.
items.zh: 我们在两个 8B 模型上评估 SparDA：MiniCPM4.1-8B [20]，其稀疏主干是 InfLLM-V2 [33]；以及 NOSA-8B [13]，它在 InfLLM-V2 之上添加了查询无关的驱逐头。准确性在 HELMET [30]、LongBench [2]、RULER [12] 和长推理套件（MATH-500 [18]、AIME 2024、AIME 2025）上测量。我们比较四种配置：密集、稀疏、InfiniGen [16] 和 SparDA。我们不直接与 DSA 特定加速器（如 IndexCache [1] 或 HISA [29]）比较，因为它们针对 token 级 DSA 而非此处使用的块稀疏主干。效率在 NVIDIA H100 和 A100 GPU 上使用第 4.3 节描述的运行时测量；Dense† 和 Sparse† 表示无卸载配置，而 Sparse、InfiniGen 和 SparDA 使用 CPU 卸载。正文报告 H100 结果；附录 D 包含 A100 结果。完整评估细节在附录 C 中。

items.en: Across all four benchmark families, SparDA matches or improves over the Sparse baseline on the overall average (Table 1). On MiniCPM4.1-8B, SparDA improves the average by +0.3, with gains on RULER (+0.5) and reasoning (+1.1), LongBench essentially flat, and HELMET slightly lower (-0.6). NOSA-8B sees a larger +2.3 average gain, driven mostly by reasoning (+6.5), RULER (+1.7), and HELMET (+1.2). Both models show a noticeable accuracy gap with Dense above Sparse on HELMET and RULER, likely because we evaluate at the models’ maximum sequence lengths (64K for MiniCPM4.1-8B, 32K for NOSA-8B), whereas their sparse-attention pretraining was conducted at shorter lengths (32K and 16K respectively). With fine-grained training supervision on the Forecast indexer, SparDA can improve over the Sparse baseline on most aggregate metrics while reducing the gap toward Dense in selected settings. InfiniGen suffers significant accuracy degradation on both models because, as a training-free method, it relies on hidden-state similarity across adjacent layers, an assumption that does not always hold. Per-task breakdowns are in Appendix D.
items.zh: 在所有四个基准族中，SparDA 在总体平均值上匹配或优于稀疏基线（表 1）。在 MiniCPM4.1-8B 上，SparDA 平均提升 +0.3，在 RULER（+0.5）和推理（+1.1）上有所提升，LongBench 基本持平，HELMET 略低（-0.6）。NOSA-8B 平均提升更大，为 +2.3，主要由推理（+6.5）、RULER（+1.7）和 HELMET（+1.2）驱动。两个模型在 HELMET 和 RULER 上密集与稀疏之间均存在明显准确性差距，可能是因为我们在模型的最大序列长度（MiniCPM4.1-8B 为 64K，NOSA-8B 为 32K）下评估，而它们的稀疏注意力预训练是在较短长度（分别为 32K 和 16K）下进行的。通过对预测索引器进行细粒度训练监督，SparDA 可以在大多数聚合指标上优于稀疏基线，同时在选定设置中缩小与密集的差距。InfiniGen 在两个模型上均遭受显著准确性下降，因为作为一种无需训练的方法，它依赖于相邻层之间隐藏状态的相似性，这一假设并不总是成立。按任务分解见附录 D。

items.en: SparDA outperforms Sparse at every sequence length on RULER for both models (Table 2). The advantage is most pronounced on NOSA-8B, where the gap widens steadily from +1.7 at 32K to +4.3 at 128K; MiniCPM4.1-8B shows a more mixed pattern (+1.5 at 32K, +0.5 at 64K, +2.1 at 96K, +1.1 at 128K). This suggests the learned Forecast generalizes at least as well as, and in some regimes better than, the training-free baseline selector.
items.zh: 在 RULER 上，SparDA 在每个序列长度上均优于稀疏（表 2）。在 NOSA-8B 上优势最为明显，差距从 32K 时的 +1.7 稳步扩大到 128K 时的 +4.3；MiniCPM4.1-8B 表现出更混合的模式（32K 时 +1.5，64K 时 +0.5，96K 时 +2.1，128K 时 +1.1）。这表明学习到的预测至少与无需训练的基线选择器一样好，在某些情况下甚至更好。

items.en: To understand where the speedup comes from, we break down per-layer attention time on MiniCPM4.1-8B at batch size 4 into block selection (green) and block-sparse attention (blue) for Sparse and SparDA (Figure 3). We focus on MiniCPM4.1-8B because NOSA-8B includes additional query-agnostic components that obscure the comparison of query-aware sparse attention, the core component shared by most sparse attention methods. During prefill (Figure 3a), block-sparse attention dominates and stays roughly constant across sequence lengths, while block selection grows with length and becomes comparable to attention at 128K. SparDA reduces block-selection cost by up to 2.50×\times at 128K while keeping block-sparse attention time comparable to Sparse. During decode (Figure 3b), the dominant cost flips: with only one query token per step, block-sparse attention is cheap, so Sparse block selection becomes the bottleneck and continues to grow with sequence length, while SparDA’s Forecast indexer keeps decode-time selection nearly flat, cutting the overhead by more than 2×\times at 128K. The near-flat decode profile reflects that the indexer’s compute is small enough to leave the GPU under-utilized, so longer contexts barely affect decode latency.
items.zh: 为了理解加速的来源，我们将 MiniCPM4.1-8B 在批量大小为 4 时的每层注意力时间分解为块选择（绿色）和块稀疏注意力（蓝色），分别对应稀疏和 SparDA（图 3）。我们关注 MiniCPM4.1-8B，因为 NOSA-8B 包含额外的查询无关组件，这掩盖了查询感知稀疏注意力（大多数稀疏注意力方法的核心组件）的比较。在预填充阶段（图 3a），块稀疏注意力占主导，并随序列长度大致保持不变，而块选择随长度增长，在 128K 时与注意力相当。SparDA 在 128K 时将块选择成本降低高达 2.50 倍，同时保持块稀疏注意力时间与稀疏相当。在解码阶段（图 3b），主导成本翻转：由于每步只有一个查询 token，块稀疏注意力成本低廉，因此稀疏的块选择成为瓶颈并随序列长度持续增长，而 SparDA 的预测索引器使解码时的选择几乎持平，在 128K 时将开销削减超过 2 倍。近乎平坦的解码曲线反映了索引器的计算量足够小，以至于 GPU 利用率不足，因此更长的上下文几乎不影响解码延迟。

items.en: The selection speedup translates directly into prefill throughput gains (Table 3). We report a single batch size of 4 because prefill throughput is insensitive to batch size, as GPUs are already fully utilized during the compute-heavy prefill phase. Dense attention leads at short sequences but its quadratic scaling causes it to fall behind as sequence length grows. SparDA consistently outperforms all other methods from 64K onward on MiniCPM4.1-8B, achieving up to 1.25×\times speedup over Sparse and 2.11×\times over Dense at 128K. On NOSA-8B, SparDA leads from 96K onward with up to 1.16×\times over Sparse and 1.40×\times over Dense at 128K. All sparse methods are slower on NOSA-8B because its query-agnostic eviction head adds extra work. The main source of SparDA’s speedup is the reduced block-selection cost of its Forecast indexer (Figure 3a), which scales more favorably than the baseline’s multi-head selector as sequence length increases. KV cache offloading itself has negligible impact on prefill throughput: Sparse†\dagger (no offload) and Sparse (with offload) are nearly identical because the only offload-time transfer is the asynchronous CPU writeback of newly created KV cache entries after they are used for attention.
items.zh: 选择加速直接转化为预填充吞吐量增益（表 3）。我们报告单个批量大小 4，因为预填充吞吐量对批量大小不敏感，GPU 在计算密集的预填充阶段已完全利用。密集注意力在短序列时领先，但其二次缩放导致随序列长度增长而落后。SparDA 在 MiniCPM4.1-8B 上从 64K 开始持续优于所有其他方法，在 128K 时相比稀疏实现高达 1.25 倍加速，相比密集实现 2.11 倍加速。在 NOSA-8B 上，SparDA 从 96K 开始领先，在 128K 时相比稀疏实现高达 1.16 倍加速，相比密集实现 1.40 倍加速。所有稀疏方法在 NOSA-8B 上更慢，因为其查询无关的驱逐头增加了额外工作。SparDA 加速的主要来源是其预测索引器降低了块选择成本（图 3a），随着序列长度增加，其缩放比基线的多头选择器更有利。KV 缓存卸载本身对预填充吞吐量影响可忽略：Sparse†（无卸载）和 Sparse（有卸载）几乎相同，因为唯一的卸载时间传输是在注意力使用后异步写回新创建的 KV 缓存条目。

items.en: Decode is where the lookahead design pays off most, as it lets CPU-to-GPU KV prefetch overlap with the current layer’s compute. Within the offload regime at 128K, SparDA achieves up to 1.69×\times speedup over Sparse on MiniCPM4.1-8B and 1.40×\times on NOSA-8B (Table 4), driven by reduced block-selection overhead (Figure 3b) and overlapped prefetch that hides the otherwise synchronous CPU-to-GPU transfer. The largest speedups appear at middle batch sizes (B8–B16), where prefetch and layer execution are roughly balanced. Against the non-offload baselines (†\dagger), which OOM past B16 at long contexts, offloading lets SparDA run much larger feasible batches and obtain correspondingly larger throughput gains, up to 5.28×5.28\times over Sparse†\dagger and 9.21×9.21\times over Dense†\dagger on MiniCPM4.1-8B. NOSA-8B shows lower speedups because its query-agnostic eviction head already reduces KV fetch traffic, leaving less room for overlap. InfiniGen is consistently slower than Sparse primarily because it gathers top-kk KV blocks on CPU before transferring them to GPU, making CPU-side gather the bottleneck. Because SparDA retains the layer-0 KV cache on GPU (Appendix C), it OOMs slightly earlier than Sparse at long contexts; nevertheless, SparDA’s peak throughput exceeds Sparse’s at every context length, even when Sparse runs at a larger batch.
items.zh: 解码是前瞻设计收益最大的地方，因为它使 CPU 到 GPU 的 KV 预取与当前层的计算重叠。在 128K 的卸载机制下，SparDA 在 MiniCPM4.1-8B 上相比稀疏实现高达 1.69 倍加速，在 NOSA-8B 上实现 1.40 倍加速（表 4），这得益于块选择开销的降低（图 3b）和重叠预取隐藏了原本同步的 CPU 到 GPU 传输。最大的加速出现在中等批量大小（B8–B16），此时预取和层执行大致平衡。与无卸载基线（†）相比，后者在长上下文下超过 B16 时内存不足，卸载使 SparDA 能够运行更大的可行批量，并获得相应更大的吞吐量增益，在 MiniCPM4.1-8B 上相比 Sparse† 高达 5.28 倍，相比 Dense† 高达 9.21 倍。NOSA-8B 显示出较低的加速，因为其查询无关的驱逐头已经减少了 KV 获取流量，留给重叠的空间较小。InfiniGen 始终慢于稀疏，主要原因是它在 CPU 上收集 top-k KV 块后再传输到 GPU，使得 CPU 端收集成为瓶颈。由于 SparDA 将第 0 层的 KV 缓存保留在 GPU 上（附录 C），它在长上下文下比稀疏稍早出现内存不足；尽管如此，SparDA 的峰值吞吐量在每个上下文长度上都超过稀疏，即使稀疏以更大的批量运行。

items.en: Appendix D provides a decode speedup breakdown that separates block-selection savings from prefetch overlap, ablations on the compression window and prefetch CTA allocation, and throughput results on NVIDIA A100 GPU.
items.zh: 附录 D 提供了解码加速分解，将块选择节省与预取重叠分开，压缩窗口和预取 CTA 分配的消融实验，以及在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上的吞吐量结果。

items.en: SparDA is not itself a sparse attention method; it is an add-on that builds on an existing sparse attention backbone to improve inference efficiency. The decoupled indexer replaces the selection path but does not change the sparse attention computation or the underlying sparse pattern. As a result, SparDA’s accuracy is bounded by the quality of the base sparse attention method. The decoupled indexer principle is not specific to block-level selection: we expect the same lookahead design to extend to token-level sparse attention such as DSA, which has been adopted by DeepSeek-V3.2 [6] and GLM-5 [11], where the Forecast would predict per-token importance scores instead of per-block scores. The same idea also applies to the Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) path of DeepSeek-V4 [7] which is built on top of DSA. We leave applying SparDA to DSA- and CSA-based models as future work, since DeepSeek-V3.2, GLM-5, and DeepSeek-V4 are all significantly larger than the 8B models used here.
items.zh: SparDA 本身并非稀疏注意力方法；它是一个附加组件，建立在现有稀疏注意力主干之上以提高推理效率。解耦索引器替换了选择路径，但不改变稀疏注意力计算或底层稀疏模式。因此，SparDA 的准确性受限于基础稀疏注意力方法的质量。解耦索引器原理并非特定于块级选择：我们预期相同的前瞻设计可扩展到 token 级稀疏注意力，例如 DSA，已被 DeepSeek-V3.2 [6] 和 GLM-5 [11] 采用，其中预测将预测每个 token 的重要性分数而非每个块的分数。相同思想也适用于 DeepSeek-V4 [7] 的压缩稀疏注意力 (CSA) 路径，该路径建立在 DSA 之上。我们将 SparDA 应用于基于 DSA 和 CSA 的模型留作未来工作，因为 DeepSeek-V3.2、GLM-5 和 DeepSeek-V4 均显著大于此处使用的 8B 模型。

items.en: SparDA shows that sparse selection can be treated as a trainable, schedulable signal rather than an operation tied to the current attention query. By decoupling selection from attention, the Forecast projection predicts block choices one layer ahead, letting the runtime overlap CPU-to-GPU KV transfer with current-layer execution while reducing selector cost through a compact GQA-level indexer. More broadly, the results suggest that sparse attention mechanisms should expose future memory-access patterns early enough for the serving system to act on them, turning sparsity from a compute-saving device into an offloading-friendly schedule. The approach still inherits the accuracy limits of the base sparse backbone, but it improves long-context inference efficiency without retraining the base model. Extending decoupled lookahead selection to token-level sparse attention and larger sparse-pretrained models is a natural direction for future work.
items.zh: SparDA 表明，稀疏选择可以被视为一种可训练、可调度的信号，而非与当前注意力查询绑定的操作。通过将选择与注意力解耦，Forecast 投影提前一层预测块选择，使运行时能够将 CPU 到 GPU 的 KV 传输与当前层执行重叠，同时通过紧凑的 GQA 级索引器降低选择器成本。更广泛地说，这些结果表明，稀疏注意力机制应尽早暴露未来的内存访问模式，以便服务系统能够据此行动，将稀疏性从节省算力的手段转变为有利于卸载的调度策略。该方法仍继承了基础稀疏骨干的精度限制，但无需重新训练基础模型即可提升长上下文推理效率。将解耦的前瞻选择扩展到词元级稀疏注意力和更大的稀疏预训练模型是未来工作的自然方向。
